feat.name: Switcheroo
feat.text: You attempt to deftly swap places with an adjacent enemy to avoid the attack. Choose an adjacent enemy and attempt to Reposition it. Instead of the normal results of Reposition, use the following.

traits.name: Swashbuckler
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the swashbuckler class.

feat.trigger: You are targeted by a ranged attack.
feat.requirement: You are adjacent to an enemy and have panache.
feat.critical_success: You swap places with the target enemy and the enemy becomes the target of the triggering attack.
feat.success: As critical success, except the target has lesser cover against the triggering attack, and you lose your panache.
feat.critical_failure: You become off-guard against the triggering attack, and you lose your panache.
